page_content:
COMM450 Ancient Worlds of Rhetoric (3 Credits)

A survey of rhetorical theory across different cultures in antiquity. Emphasizes cultural contexts in which rhetorical acts of advising, instructing, persuading, and arguing emerge. Draws connections between ancient theories and contemporary communication problems. Prerequisite: COMM250.

Restriction: Must be in Communication program.

Credit Only Granted for. COMM450 or COMM650.
